subject: Mikasa Ackerman from Attack on Titan, close-up portrait showing emotional distress with hands pressed to head
description: A close-up anime-style portrait of a young woman with short dark hair and large expressive eyes, pressing both hands to the sides of her head in a gesture of emotional overwhelm or distress. She wears a brown jacket. Her expression is open-mouthed, conveying shock, grief, or despair. The background is plain and dark. The image is framed card art at medium resolution with card text visible below the illustration panel.
foreground: anime figure with hands pressed to head, distressed expression
emotion: hands pressed to temples, mouth open, expression of distress or despair
